candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Consider the diagram in the figure regarding a mountainous region. The diagram shows the average winter temperature (left-hand y-axis) at different altitudes (x-axis) and the abundance of three tree species (right-hand y-axis) at different altitudes (x-axis). Which species is/are found below an altitude of 500m?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 根据所给图表,在海拔 500 米以下,丰度最高的树种是 $\text{Species C}$。
